_descricao: Example configuration file for NFe DestSync. Copy this file, rename it to config.json, and replace all example values with your own company data.
_importante: Do not commit your real config.json to GitHub.
Use only digits in CNPJ fields, without dots, slashes or hyphens.
EmpresaDestino defines the company that will replace the NF-e dest block.
EmpresasValidas defines which original recipient companies are allowed to be converted.
If the original recipient CNPJ is not listed in EmpresasValidas, the XML will not be changed.
